variants: Gizelle Vargas was born in Heronrift Village and has since made a name for herself in the hospitality industry as an employee of Zinnia Peak Hotels. In addition to her professional work, she serves as a Recruiter for Lattice Lane Studio, contributing her time and expertise to help others find opportunities in the creative arts.
